case_title: PRECLARO, ARLENE vs. BUSH & KEARNY FOOD CENTER et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRECLARO, ARLENE AS TO DEFENDANT BUSH & KEARNY FOOD CENTER DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-29-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-28-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-09-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-29-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-29-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR SEP-28-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-28-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-28-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-28-1994 CONTINUED FROM SEP-28-1994 TO OCT-28-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-28-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-28-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TOTAL SANCTIONS ARE $150, PAYABLE BY 11-28-94. TO SHOW CASE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PURS CRC 525., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-28-1994 CONTINUED FROM OCT-28-1994 TO NOV-28-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
